---
title: "Lads and Lasses of Langley. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “Langley School”"
---

## Lads and Lasses of Langley. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “Langley School”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Walter Smith (late Mozley), 34 King Street, Covent Garden

### Notes

The stories are ‘Cheap Jack’,  ‘Frank’s Debt’,  ‘Curiosity Trap’,  ‘Drumbledore Bill’ and ‘Wolf’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
